creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
remko       2008-06-03 16:58:14 UTC

  FreeBSD doc repository

  Modified files:
    share/sgml           usergroups.xml 
  Log:
  Update the usergroups pages.
  
  o Remove SeaBUG, it's been down for at least 5 months
  o Re-add VicFUG, it's come back
  o Revert the change I submitted (rev. 1.63) to change the GTABUG
    URL from gtabug.ca to gtabug.com - gtabug.ca is back, and is more
    up-to-date than the .com.
  
  PR: www/124239
  Submitted by:   gavin
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.70      +12 -14    www/share/sgml/usergroups.xml
